name: Uni
description: Uni is the daughter of Aria and granddaughter of Luce. She is a young girl who is the Millefiore Family's second-in-command and the former leader of the Giglio Nero Famiglia as a result of the early death of her mother, whom she did not know was a Mafia boss. She inherited the Orange Arcobaleno Pacifier from her mother. This Pacifier has been passed down in their family for generations. When Aria passed away, she learns of the mafia and the leadership role she must play for the Giglio Nero Famil

name: Yagura
description: Yagura was a shinobi from Kirigakure and the host of the Three-Tailed Giant Turtle. When the Three-Tails was captured by Akatsuki, it had no host and roamed out in the wild. Why the beast was removed from this jinchūriki is unknown. Because Yūkimaru has some control over the Three-Tails, and because he has some resemblance to this jinchūriki, it is speculated that they have some connection to each other, however Yūkimaru is a anime-only character that does not appear in the manga.

name: Yami no Akuma
description: The Yami no Akuma is a devil that embodies the primal fear of the dark.

name: Yashiro Hoshimiya
description: A white-haired girl who claims to be an alien esper, often wearing a spacesuit and occasionally talking in a silly alien-like manner. She is rumored to be a troublesome runaway.
mediaTitles: Ground Control to Psychoelectric Girl: The Nighttime Sun
searchTerms: Ground Control to Psychoelectric Girl: The Nighttime Sun

name: Yuu
description: An orphan who killed three people - mother, kid and a man. He is in prison (death row) waiting for his death to the point that he attempted suicide numerous times. ~!His abusive father caused Yuu's three-year younger brother to go blind. Their mother could not handle the abuse so she abandoned her children, and so Yuu and his brother were sent to an orphanage. Since the brother would get teased a lot, they ran away and lived on the streets together. For his brother's sake Yuu shoplifted and even

name: Ziggy
description: An android that was once known as the "Demon King". He raised Shiki and taught him the value of making friends.

name: Aki Murasame
description: __Height:__ 164 cm A girl who is a Mecha-Ude user called the "Iron Twin Arm Host" and belongs to the organization known as ARMS. She is after the mysterious worm-type Mecha-Ude user that killed her family. Because she has combined (derized) with two Mecha-Ude, she expends a lot of energy, so she's always hungry and can be seen eating something often. She enjoys sweets and high-calorie foods, and dislikes studying. (Source: Official Site)

name: Akira Gunji
description: A normal high school freshman with a strong sense of justice and a kind heart. His late father was a police officer.

name: Akira Inukai
description: A young man with an unfriendly, blunt, but also honest personality. He's the kind of person to act before speaking. Tamarai and Asaji call him "Aki (-chan)."

name: Akito Sudou
description: Akito Sudo is another Class A karuta player. Together with his teammates from Hokuō Academy Karuta Club he was playing against the Mizusawa Karuta Club. After his team loses to them, he gains respect for them and supports Chihaya. It has been noted that Sudo has incredible potential that is stifled by his tendency towards sadism.

name: Albert Desler
description: Desler is the Leader of the alien race known as the Gamilas and the main villain of Space Battleship Yamato. It was Desler who masterminded the attack on Earth, forcing the humans to move underground due to the radioactive meteore-bombs unleashed on the planet by the Gamilas fleet. Although initially portrayed as a dictator bent on conquest seemingly for it's own sake, it's later revealed that Desler seeks to conquer the Earth in order to find a new home for his people, following the imminent de
mediaTitles: Star Blazers: The Quest for Iscandar
searchTerms: Star Blazers: The Quest for Iscandar

name: Albert Wesker
nativeName: アルバート・ウェスカー
description: Wesker is a former captain of S.T.A.R.S. He is the developer of the T-Virus and a specialist in germ warfare. He secretly spread around the virus. Power-hungry, intelligent and cunning, Albert Wesker was a man who sought power and domination over the entire human race, all for his own gain. To this end, he was affiliated with the Umbrella Corporation, as one of its most promising researchers, and at the same time participated in illicit activities by going undercover as an officer in the R.P.D.
mediaTitles: Biohazard Umbrella Chronicles: Houkai e no Jokyoku
searchTerms: アルバート・ウェスカー
Biohazard Umbrella Chronicles: Houkai e no Jokyoku

name: Alicia
description: Alicia is a close friend of Helck. She is a mercenary that Helck met on his journey to Edil's home. She comes from a long line of mercenaries. She was told that one of her ancestors was a hero that fought demons before the current Human Empire was founded. (Source: helck.fandom.com)

name: Aurora
description: She is one of [Chitose](https://anilist.co/character/137515/Chitose-Kaginoji)'s maids. She is usually serious and cold-minded. Probably the exact opposite personality of [Charlotte](https://anilist.co/character/137517/Charlotte): the second maid of [Chitose](https://anilist.co/character/137515/Chitose-Kaginoji). She always appears with [Charlotte](https://anilist.co/character/137517/Charlotte) and she usually tries to stop her from being too impulsive. (Source: Tonikaku Kawaii Wikia)
mediaTitles: TONIKAWA: Over The Moon For You
TONIKAWA: Over The Moon For You Season 2
TONIKAWA: Over The Moon For You ~SNS~

name: Avan
description: Avan De Ziniur III was the previous hero who defeated the Demon King Hadlar. When he was younger, he befriended princess Flora, the ruler of the kingdom of Carl, and Loca, the general of Carl's army, usually goofing around behind his thick glasses to hide his true power from everyone. When Hadlar tried to murder Flora, Avan decided not to hide anymore and protected her and the whole kingdom from the Demon King. After temporarily defeating him, he embarks on a journey with Loca where he would mee
mediaTitles: Dragon Quest: The Adventure of Dai
Dragon Quest: The Adventure of Dai
searchTerms: Dragon Quest: The Adventure of Dai

name: Ayame
description: Ayame is the daughter of the cook [Teuchi](https://anilist.co/character/17312/Teuchi). Together they run the Ichiraku Ramen Bar.

name: Ayami Sasaki
description: Sasaki Ayami is a member of Komi's group for the year 1 field trip. She made a pact with Katou Mikuni to make sure the trip is as fun as possible for Komi. She is also very talented with yo-yos.

name: Azel Halgal
description: [Amir's](https://anilist.co/character/26120/) older brother.

name: Bambollina
description: Bambollina is the Guild Leader of Pantheon.

name: Belgrieve
description: A former adventurer whose dreams were shattered long ago. An injury forced him to return to his hometown, but part of him could never give up on adventuring. This inspired his daughter to follow his path, and even now, he continues to train. He is quite bothered by the moniker 'Red Ogre" his daughter gave him.
mediaTitles: My Daughter Left the Nest and Returned an S-Rank Adventurer
My Daughter Left the Nest and Returned an S-Rank Adventurer
My Daughter Left the Nest and Returned an S-Rank Adventurer
searchTerms: My Daughter Left the Nest and Returned an S-Rank Adventurer

name: Cabel Willard
description: General of the Imperial Knights, the Duke's successor. Also called the "Grim Reaper" of the battlefield.

name: Caelus
description: __Height__: 186 cm The head of the Marquis's household. In the original timeline, he loved Diana and silently protected her from behind, even going so far as to eliminate Princess Letona and Duke Orcus who were threatening her, but Diana resented him and turned her back on him. The trauma of this led him to commit suicide the day after Helios and Diana's wedding.

name: Cho-Won Lee
description: Cho-Won is a dominant omega, talented violinist and Do-Jun's ex partner.
